nasb.text: He who grasps the bow will not stand his ground, The swift of foot will not escape, Nor will he who rides the horse save his life.

esv.text: he who handles the bow shall not stand, and he who is swift of foot shall not save himself, nor shall he who rides the horse save his life;

cnv.text: 拿弓的人站立不住， 跑得快的不能逃走， 騎馬的也不能救自己。

ccb.text: 拉弓的站立不住， 腿快的无法逃脱， 骑马的救不了自己。
